name: integrity-suite
description: Strict project template for automated setup and code quality.

scripts.start: node dist/index.js || echo 'No entry point configured'
scripts.test:full: eslint . --max-warnings 0 && markdownlint . && prettier --check . && tsc --noEmit && node .integrity-suite/scripts/check-audit.js && pnpm check-version && pnpm check-changelog && pnpm test:meta && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:nobump: eslint . --max-warnings 0 && markdownlint . && prettier --check . && tsc --noEmit && node .integrity-suite/scripts/check-audit.js && pnpm check-version:relaxed && pnpm check-changelog && pnpm test:meta && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e

author: Marc Galindo (marcundertest) - https://marcundertest.com
